titles.title: Build Nuclear with Local Materials Act of 2026
Build Nuclear with Local Materials Act of 2026
A bill to require the Nuclear Regulatory Commission to allow the use of commercial-grade steel and concrete in non-safety-related structures at nuclear power plants, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Environment and Public Works.
Committee on Environment and Public Works Subcommittee on Clean Air, Climate, and Nuclear Innovation and Safety. Hearings held.

committee.name: Senate Environment and Public Works
committee.subcommittee: Clean Air, Climate, and Nuclear Innovation and Safety Subcommittee
